tools.name: best_lawyers_search
tools.description: Search for lawyers by practice area, location. At least one search parameter must be provided. Practice area (practiceArea): use one of: Administrative/Regulatory Law, Alternative Dispute Resolution (Arbitration/Mediation), Antitrust/Competition Law, Appellate Practice, Banking and Finance Law, Bankruptcy/Insolvency and Restructuring Law, Capital Markets/Securities Law, Commercial Litigation, Communications/Telecommunications Law, Construction Law, Corporate Law, Criminal Defense, Education Law, Elder Law, Employment/Labor Law, Energy Law, Entertainment Law, Environmental Law, Family Law, Franchising Law, Gaming Law, Government Contracts/Relations, Healthcare Law, Immigration Law, Insurance Law, Intellectual Property Law, International Trade Law, Land Use/Zoning Law, Maritime/Admiralty Law, Mergers and Acquisitions, Municipal/Public Finance Law, Natural Resources/Mining Law, Oil and Gas Law, Personal Injury Litigation, Privacy and Data Security Law, Private Equity/Venture Capital, Product Liability, Professional Malpractice, Project Finance, Real Estate Law, Sports Law, Tax Law, Technology Law, Trusts and Estates, Workers' Compensation Law. Use 2-letter country code (countryCode). Valid country codes: AE, AM, AR, AT, AU, AZ, BE, BG, BH, BR, BY, CA, CH, CL, CN, CO, CR, CY, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, GB, GE, GR, GT, HN, HR, HU, IE, IL, IS, IT, JP, KE, KG, KR, KW, KZ, LI, LT, LU, LV, MD, MK, MX, NI, NL, NO, NZ, OM, PA, PE, PL, PR, PT, QA, RC, RO, RU, SA, SE, SG, SI, SK, TJ, TM, TR, UA, US, UZ, VE, YU, ZA. Use 2-letter state or province code (stateCode). Valid state/province codes: AL, AK, AZ, AR, CA, CO, CT, DE, DC, FL, GA, HI, ID, IL, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MD, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NE, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NY, NC, ND, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VT, VA, WA, WV, WI, WY, AB, BC, MB, NB, NL, NT, NS, NU, ON, PE, QC, SK, YT. Use lotyOnly=true to filter to only Lawyers of the Year.
